nasb.text: The Lord has made known His salvation; He has revealed His righteousness in the sight of the nations.

esv.text: The Lord has made known his salvation; he has revealed his righteousness in the sight of the nations.

cnv.text: 耶和華顯明了他的救恩， 在列國眼前顯示了他的公義。

ccb.text: 耶和华显明了祂的拯救之恩， 向列邦彰显了祂的公义。

csbs.text: 耶和华显明了他的救恩， 在列国眼前显出他的公义。
